description_long: This is a tall, rectangular stone obelisk with a smooth, weathered surface, standing on a multi-tiered square base. The base is constructed from large, roughly hewn stone blocks, with the lowest tier slightly wider and featuring a rugged, naturalistic edge. The shaft of the obelisk is slender and tapers gently towards the top, ending in a simple, flat tip. One face of the obelisk displays an engraved inscription and a circular relief, likely commemorative or memorial in nature, while the other sides are plain. The monument is set on a patch of ground covered with grass and scattered dry leaves, suggesting an outdoor park or cemetery setting. The overall appearance is solemn and monumental, typical of memorial obelisks found in public spaces.
description: A tall, weathered stone obelisk with a multi-tiered square base and engraved inscription on one face, set on a grassy patch with dry leaves.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plain face of the obelisk and the rugged, multi-tiered stone base.
description_view_1: Engraved face with visible inscription and circular relief, highlighting the commemorative aspect of the obelisk.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned shaft and the layered stone base with visible weathering.
description_view_3: Side view showing the smooth, uninscribed face and the stepped structure of the base.
attribute_inscription: One face (view 1) features an engraved inscription in a serif typeface, with a circular relief above the text. The language appears to be English, but the text is only partially legible due to weathering.
attribute_ornamentation: A circular relief is present above the inscription on the front face; otherwise, no additional ornamentation is visible.
attribute_base_design: The base consists of three square tiers of stone, each progressively smaller as they ascend. The lowest tier has a rugged, naturalistic edge, while the upper tiers are smoother and more regular. The base is solid and substantial, providing stability.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and unadorned, with a simple, squared-off finish and no decorative elements.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by a patch of grass and scattered dry leaves, with no other notable features or objects immediately adjacent.
